mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE userType = '普通用户' AND inviteCode = #{inviteCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM user WHERE userType = '普通用户' ORDER BY userID DESC

SELECT * FROM user WHERE userType = '普通用户'
AND ( CAST(userID AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR userName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR PhoneNumber LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR userMailbox LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR RealName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR inviteCode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY userID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET PhoneNumber = #{phoneNumber}, userMailbox = #{userMailbox}, userName = #{userName}, RealName = #{realName}, IDNumber = #{idNumber}, Gender = #{gender}, Birthday = #{birthday} WHERE userID = #{userID}
UPDATE user SET userPassword = #{userPassword} WHERE userID = #{userID}
UPDATE user SET paymentQrCodePath = #{paymentQrCodePath} WHERE userID = #{userID}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user WHERE userID = #{userID} AND userType = '普通用户'
